en.title: Web Development in Brisbane | Premier Digital Agency
en.description: Expert web development services in Brisbane. We build modern, scalable websites to help Australian businesses succeed online.
en.h1: Queensland's Fastest-Growing Businesses Trust Modern Web Engineering
en.p: AVPdev builds conversion-optimized Next.js sites and intelligent bots for Brisbane's construction, tourism, and enterprise sectors.

benefits.title: Fast Launch
benefits.desc: We launch MVP projects in the shortest possible time, saving your budget.

benefits.title: Backend & Web Apps
benefits.desc: We architect fault-tolerant web applications and complex APIs tailored to your business needs.

benefits.title: Extensive Tech Stack
benefits.desc: We build more than just websites: complex SPAs on Next.js, Astro, plus custom bots and web scrapers.

faq.q: Is it possible to develop a custom data scraper?
faq.a: Yes, we create tailored solutions for automated data extraction and processing from diverse internet resources.

faq.q: Do you only build traditional websites?
faq.a: No, we specialize in high-load Web Apps, PWAs, Telegram bots, and complex data collection scripts (scrapers).

benefits.title: SEO Optimization
benefits.desc: All websites are developed taking into account current search engine algorithms for better ranking.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Brisbane?
faq.a: Pricing starts from $250 for Astro landing pages and $300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from $750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from $50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
